message:
fix(mayor): run session from mayorDir instead of townRoot

Mayor was running from ~/gt/ (town root) instead of ~/gt/mayor/.
Tools like gt prime use workspace.FindFromCwd() which walks UP to find
the town root, so running from ~/gt/mayor/ correctly resolves to ~/gt/.

Also adds mayor/deacon settings paths to the doctor session hook check.

Based on PR #972 by aleiby.

Co-Authored-By: aleiby <aleiby@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -459,7 +459,9 @@ func sessionWorkDir(sessionName, townRoot string) (string, error) {
 
 	switch {
 	case sessionName == mayorSession:
-		return townRoot, nil
+		// Mayor runs from ~/gt/mayor/, not town root.
+		// Tools use workspace.FindFromCwd() which walks UP to find town root.
+		return townRoot + "/mayor", nil
 
 	case sessionName == deaconSession:
 		return townRoot + "/deacon", nil
